## 🐛 Bug Description

A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

---

## 🔁 Steps to Reproduce

1. Go to '...'
2. Enter ticker '...'
3. Click '...'
4. See error

---

## ✅ Expected Behaviour

What you expected to happen.

---

## ❌ Actual Behaviour

What actually happened. Include any error messages or screenshots.

---

## 🌍 Environment

| Field | Value |
|:---|:---|
| OS | e.g. macOS 14, Windows 11, Ubuntu 22 |
| Browser | e.g. Chrome 120, Safari 17 |
| Python version | e.g. 3.11.0 |
| Node version | e.g. 20.x |
| Deployment | Local / Render |

## 📎 Additional Context

Add any other context, logs, or screenshots here.
